rows.label: tev078202_MSG0001
rows.name:
Listen to this, [ST:playername ]! *fsssh* I have
successfully disgorged a new Zaruboggan![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078202_MSG0002
rows.name:
This never could have happened
if you hadn't rescued me in
Nightglow Forest. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078202_SEL0011
rows.name:
Tell Arsenican that
you're happy for him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078202_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Arsenican what exactly it
means to "disgorge" a child.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078202_MSG0005
rows.name:
Thank you kindly! I knew you were a good
person, through and through. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078202_MSG0006
rows.name:
If you wouldn't mind, I'd love for you to speak
with Orleron. I think it would be a valuable
experience for him to meet a [ST:gender p1=man p2=woman ]of your caliber. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078202_MSG0009
rows.name:
We are all the children of
Golbogga. *fsssh* What I did
was merely disgorge a new life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078202_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you are interested in the life I disgorged,
his name is Orleron. *fsssh* It would please
me to have you speak with him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev078202_MSG0011
rows.name:
That should make it clear what exactly he is.
*fsssh* And I also think it would be valuable
for him to meet a person such as yourself.[ST:wait ]
